allow: Bash(python -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p = sync_playwright\(\).start\(\); browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\); page = browser.new_page\(viewport={'width': 1440, 'height': 900}\); page.goto\('http://localhost:8765/agent_demo04.html', timeout=10000\); page.wait_for_load_state\('networkidle'\); page.screenshot\(path='e:/me/Python/Agent/tmp/dark_mode_check.png', full_page=False\); browser.close\(\); p.stop\(\); print\('Screenshot saved'\)")
